name: copyfield
title: CopyField
description: Read-only mono value with copy (and reveal, for secrets). For API keys, IPs, DNS records.

files.content:
Read-only mono value with copy (and reveal, for secrets). For API keys, IPs, DNS records.

```jsx
<CopyField label="API key" value="ef_live_a91xK2mQ84vT" secret />
<CopyField label="CNAME" value="app.efolusi.com" />
```
